data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. MEDDLESOME doesn't win out of turn but rarely finishes far away. Drops back to a winning trip on a short turnaround and keeps Looker. Leading player. 9. THINK BACK has shown good early muster since resuming this campaign and finally got the job done last start at Muswellbrook when leading all the way. Will look to do the same. 10. IT'S A WRITTEN hasn't done much wrong of late and keeps Roper. Worth keeping safe. 1. RUGBY failed to get involved first-up after settling a long way off them at Toowoomba. Better for that hitout and has found an easier assignment. Worth keeping safe, watch for him late.","runners":[4,9,10,1],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: ARMIDALE-R6-Fav Out
